title: Child class fields should not differ from parent class fields only by capitalization
description: Child class fields should not differ from parent class fields only by capitalizationAnalyze your codeconsistency-identifiablemaintainabilityCode SmellpitfallWhy is this an issue?Having a field in a child class with a name that differs from a parent class' field only by capitalization is sure to cause confusion. Such child class fields should be renamed.Noncompliant code examplepublic class Fruit { protected string plantingSeason; //... } public class Raspberry : Fruit { protected string plantingseason; // Noncompliant // ..
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
